title: 菊花賞の後に・エデンへ至るヒント

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my concerns, Gold Ship puts on a
fantastic showing in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The sky is the limit from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And that's another race done and dusted.
Wheeew...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Being relaxed truly is the best weapon in my
arsenal. Now, time to chillax...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can't you see I'm getting my zen on? Let's
take it slow.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
With my unique talents, I can even turn a barren
wasteland into a plentiful carrot farm in no time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go show the world how great it is to
live off the land.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how I try to call out to her, Gold Ship
doesn't even spare me a second glance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make to go after her before she disappears from
my view, but then...
A shame, Golshi.

So you've chosen to turn away from the life of
competition.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What the... Who's there?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Flash? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A certain individual asked me to act as a
messenger and relay missives to you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was meant to deliver helpful information to you
today...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But if you are withdrawing from racing, then such
data is no longer relevant to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...What kind of info are we talking about here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Information that may aid your search for Eden.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What?! Did you say Eden?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Um, what's that again?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! That curious and alluring locale!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Flash, forget what I said before! Tell me where
Eden is, I'm begging you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So, you have changed your mind. However, the
information I carry is of vital importance. I cannot
simply give it to you free of charge.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I must first challenge you to battle
upon the stage of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen? Does that mean you'll tell me if
I race you there?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, without fail. You have my word.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Very well, you're on! Arima Kinen, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious about the "certain individual" who
gave Eishin Flash that information, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More than that, I'm just glad Gold Ship is
motivated to race again!
